CREATE TABLE geometries (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geom) VALUES (1, ST_Point(10, 2));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geom) VALUES (2, ST_Point(15, 5));
SELECT ST_SetSRID(geom, 4326) FROM geometries WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ST_SetSRID(ST_Point(10, 2), 4500) AS new_geom, id FROM geometries;
SELECT g1.id, ST_SetSRID(g1.geom, g2.srid) AS updated_geom FROM geometries g1 JOIN (SELECT 4335 AS srid) g2 ON g1.id = 1;
WITH updated AS (SELECT ST_SetSRID(geom, 1234) AS new_geom FROM geometries WHERE id = 2) SELECT * FROM updated;
CREATE TABLE additional_geometries (id INT PRIMARY KEY, geom GEOMETRY);
INSERT INTO additional_geometries (id, geom) SELECT id, ST_SetSRID(geom, 4321) FROM geometries;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geometries WHERE ST_SetSRID(geom, 4326) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePolygon(ST_MakeLine(ARRAY[ST_Point(10,10), ST_Point(20,10), ST_Point(20,20), ST_Point(10,20), ST_Point(10,10)])), 4321) AS polygon_geom;
